column1: # Owner: Jane. Machine-readable. Tab-separated, '#' comments ignored.
# Her hp/speed/power/xp live in glyphs.tsv; her art in sprites/countess.txt.
# THE RULE: at 19:00 the clock FREEZES and the ambient spawn director HALTS.
# Nothing on the field but the Countess and what she summons. The night does not
# end on a timer — it ends when she dies. A 20-minute run must not be decided by
# the player standing in a corner waiting for a clock.

column4: stop the run timer while she lives
no ambient spawns during the fight
seconds she glows before a charge; the player's whole tell
wu/s during a charge — much faster than the player's 20
degrees/sec while charging. slow. she is baitable.
burning trail left by a charge
damage per second standing in it
seconds before the trail burns out
summoned bats use the normal Bat stats
seconds; if she's still alive, +50% charge cadence. no stalling.

column1: # hp_from/hp_to are percentages of max HP, descending.
# cadence = seconds between attacks. count = how many per attack.

column9: stationary. summons bats in a closing ring around HERSELF. kill them or drown.
charges the player in straight lines, leaving a burning trail. slow turns — bait her.
the field goes black beyond your lantern (even with --no-dark). she is fast. your gore-carpet is the only map you have.

column1: # Phase 3 is the payoff for §9: 19 minutes of kills have painted a map of where
# you've been. In the dark, that carpet is the only thing telling you where you
# are. The decal layer stops being decoration and becomes navigation.
